data.name: Footer_Copyright
data.value: Unlocking Hidden Wonders Across Egypt. All rights reserved.

data.name: Ai_Description
data.value: Your smart travel companion for personalized itineraries will live here.

data.name: About_Text
data.value: EGYXPLORE combines Artificial Intelligence, GIS, and Gamification to revolutionize tourism in Egypt. Discover hidden archaeological sites, earn rewards, and experience Egypt like never before.

data.name: Feature1_Text
data.value: The Great Pyramids of Giza were built more than 4,500 years ago as tombs for the ancient Egyptian pharaohs. The Great Pyramid is the oldest of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World and the only one still standing today. The Pyramids of Giza are one of the most famous tourist attractions in the world. There are many interesting places to visit in Egypt.

data.name: Feature2_Text
data.value: Our AI generates personalized itineraries based on your interests, budget, and trip duration. Smart GIS routing finds the optimal path between destinations.

data.name: Feature3_Text
data.value: Complete missions, earn points, and collect badges on your Digital Heritage Passport. Redeem points for hotel discounts, museum tickets, and exclusive experiences.

data.name: Contact_GIS_Text
data.value: Smart route optimization using ArcGIS Network Analysis

data.name: Contact_Gamified_Text
data.value: Missions, badges, and rewards for every explorer

data.name: Explore_Subtitle
data.value: Discover destinations across the Nile Valley & beyond

data.name: Explore_MapNote
data.value: Each list card carries data-lat / data-lng / data-id for future markers

data.name: NearMe_Subtitle
data.value: Discover partners close to the site you'll visit

data.name: About_Intro
data.value: [Organization intro goes here — e.g. who we are and our mission to make Egypt's heritage accessible to every traveler.]

data.name: About_StoryText
data.value: [Organization story goes here — founding, what inspired the platform, and the problem it solves for tourists and local sites.]

data.name: About_TeamText
data.value: [Team section goes here — founders, contributors, or partners. Replace with real copy later.]

data.name: Features_Subtitle
data.value: Your smart companion for exploring Egypt — maps, games, AI, and rewards, all in your pocket.

data.name: Features_Feature1_Text
data.value: Never get lost inside vast museums and temples. High-detail indoor maps guide you corridor by corridor through Egypt's heritage sites.

data.name: Features_Feature2_Text
data.value: Turn-by-turn routing between destinations with smart GIS optimization that accounts for opening hours and travel time.

data.name: Features_Feature3_Text
data.value: Turn every visit into an adventure with location-based mini-games and scavenger hunts for the whole family.

data.name: Features_Feature4_Text
data.value: Point your camera at a monument to instantly reveal its history, era, and the stories carved into every stone.

data.name: Features_Feature5_Text
data.value: Ask anything about Egypt's wonders and get personalized itineraries, tips, and answers powered by a smart travel assistant.

data.name: Features_Feature6_Text
data.value: Break the language barrier with real-time peer-to-peer translation, so you can connect with locals wherever you roam.

data.name: Features_Feature7_Text
data.value: Earn points for every mission and redeem them for exclusive discounts on meals, stays, and experiences with our partners.

data.name: Features_BottomText
data.value: Download the app and unlock hidden wonders across Egypt.

data.name: Reward_NoneAvailable
data.value: No rewards available right now. Check back later!

data.name: SponsorPortal_NoReviewsInfo
data.value: No reviews yet for your place — the rating card will populate once tourists leave reviews.

data.name: TouristSupport_NoResponse
data.value: No response yet. We'll notify you here once an admin replies.

data.name: SponsorNotification_NoResponseYet
data.value: No response yet. We'll notify you here once an admin replies.

data.name: SponsorPortal_ManageHelp
data.value: Manage your branches and rewards from the respective portal sections.

data.name: RoleAdmin_AccountProtectedTitle
data.value: Cannot change or delete your own account

data.name: SponsorRedemption_EmptyMessage
data.value: No redemptions found for the selected filters.

data.name: TripPlan_ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete

data.name: TouristAdmin_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete

data.name: TripDetails_MapMarkerInfo
data.value: Each stop carries data-lat / data-lng / data-id for future markers

data.name: RoleAdmin_DeleteConfirmPrefix
data.value: This will permanently remove the login account for

data.name: SponsorNotification_AlertsInfo
data.value: Alerts are generated automatically for expired or out-of-stock rewards and recent redemptions. Click a notification to open what it refers to.

data.name: SponsorReview_NoReviewsInfo
data.value: No reviews have been submitted yet.

data.name: SponsorReward_DeleteNote
data.value: Soft-delete will be performed: the reward status will be set to "Removed" instead of being permanently deleted.

data.name: Sponsor_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete

data.name: Destination_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete

data.name: SponsorPortal_CompleteProfileIntro
data.value: Your account is assigned to the Sponsor role, but no sponsor profile is linked yet. Please fill in your business details below to continue.

data.name: RoleAdmin_DeleteHelp
data.value: Deleting an account removes the login only — the linked Tourist/Sponsor profile and all historical data are preserved.

data.name: Mission_Delete_Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete

data.name: SponsorBranch_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this branch?

data.name: TripDetails_ReorderNotice
data.value: You reordered the stops — please review and adjust each stop's dates if needed.

data.name: SponsorReward_EmptyState
data.value: No rewards found. Add your first reward above.

data.name: RewardAdmin_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete

data.name: SponsorPortal_MetricsScopeHelp
data.value: Metrics are scoped to your own rewards and branches.
